description: Composition Navy blue and red V-neck printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a small collar, cap sleeves, 4 buttoned placket with piping decoration around neckline, flared skirt with piping decorating the vertical seams on front and back and panel decorating the hemline Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This printed kurta from biba has a great flared shape highlighted by subtle piping running vertically down the seams making this a figure flattering choice – remember that vertical lines will draw the eye up and down making you look taller. The navy blue and red shades look great together and the flared shape makes this top into a party wear winner. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
